message:
refactor(mcp): gate test-only imports behind #[cfg(test)]

Move CautError, MCP_ERR_CASS, MCP_ERR_CAUT, MCP_ERR_CONFIG,
MCP_ERR_NOT_IMPLEMENTED, MCP_ERR_PANE_NOT_FOUND, MCP_ERR_WEZTERM,
and map_caut_error behind #[cfg(test)] to eliminate unused imports
in release builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
